name: Start Docker Compose
description: Start Docker Compose services. Runs 'docker-compose up -d' in the project directory. Docker daemon must be running.

parameters.name: Compose Project Name
parameters.description: Project name for Docker Compose (directory name)

parameters.name: Startup Timeout
parameters.description: Seconds to wait for Docker services to become healthy (--wait-timeout).

commands.description: Start Docker Compose services with docker-compose up -d
